mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite_info ( user_id, resource_id, resource_type, canceled, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{resourceId}, #{resourceType}, #{canceled}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.select: SELECT favorite_id, user_id, resource_id, resource_type, canceled, create_time, update_time, deleted FROM favorite_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND resource_id = #{resourceId} AND resource_type = #{resourceType} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
